items.text: Natural light — open door or window immediately
items.note: Sets circadian clock. Even 5 minutes outside counts. Critical for melatonin regulation and cortisol rhythm.
You're dehydrated after sleep. Do this before coffee.
4000 IU D3 + 100mcg K2 MK-7. With food.
2g EPA/DHA. With food.
1 capsule. Morning only — can be stimulating.
15–25mg. With food.
300–600mg. Cycle 8–12 weeks on, 4 weeks off.
5g. In water or coffee.
500–1000mg. Fruiting body extract only.
120mg. Avoid if taking blood thinners.
Lets adenosine clear naturally. Prevents the mid-afternoon energy crash.
Sets satiety hormones for the whole day. Eggs, Greek yoghurt, meat.
Cold finish raises alertness and circulation. Cleanse face in shower with dedicated cleanser.

items.text: Vitamin C + Glycolic Acid Serum — 3 drops
items.note: Apply to clean dry skin. Antioxidant protection works best AM. Brightens and evens tone.
Replaces separate moisturiser. Hyaluronic acid + peptides. Focus on lines.
Cold applicator depuffs in AM. Tap gently, don't drag or pull.
Daily, year-round. Yorkshire overcast still delivers UV. After all serums.
Don't rinse with water after — let fluoride sit on teeth.
Once daily. Morning or evening — just be consistent.

items.text: 90-min deep work block — no messages, no Slack
items.note: Prefrontal cortex is freshest. Use it for the hardest thinking.

items.text: Move every 45–60 min — stand up, 2 min
items.note: Set a repeating timer. Prolonged sitting is independently harmful even with exercise.
6-hour half-life. Post-2pm coffee is still active at midnight.
Legumes, brassicas, protein, olive oil. Simple is fine.
Reduces blood glucose spike. One of the best free cognitive interventions.
Marine collagen 2331mg at 650 Dalton. Any fruit or veg provides the Vitamin C needed for synthesis.
Alternate strength / Zone 2 cardio. Zone 2 = conversational pace. Critical for cognitive function.

items.text: One improvement to PureClarity — ship something
items.note: Fix, feature, copy, infra, docs. Size doesn't matter. Daily momentum compounds.
Single biggest sleep quality lever. Late eating raises resting heart rate significantly.
Lamps only. Overhead lights off. Blue-spectrum light suppresses melatonin production.

items.text: Blue light filter on all screens from 9pm
items.note: f.lux on Windows, Night Mode on Android. Or screens off by 10pm.

items.text: Cleanse — remove SPF and day grime
items.note: Full cleanse essential at night. SPF left on overnight clogs pores and degrades skin.
PM only. BHA exfoliant — clears pores and reduces redness. Let absorb 60 seconds before next step.
PM only — photosensitive. Anti-wrinkle, firms, reduces dark spots. Apply after salicylic.
Seals serums in. Hyaluronic acid + peptides work during sleep.
Floss if not done in morning.
30–60 min before sleep. Most people notice improved sleep depth within the first week.
New builds run warm. Core temperature drop is the primary trigger for sleep onset.

items.text: Phone outside bedroom or face-down and silenced
items.note: Charger in another room is the only reliably effective fix.
Circadian rhythm runs on regularity more than total hours.
